## Issue Reference
Closes #[issue-number]

## Changes Made
Brief description of what was implemented (1-2 sentences max).

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests written and passing
- [ ] Widget tests written and passing  
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Follows UI guidelines and uses centralized components
- [ ] Code passes `flutter analyze`
- [ ] Code formatted with `dart format`

## UI/UX Compliance
- [ ] Uses only approved colors from CLAUDE.md
- [ ] Uses centralized components from shared library
- [ ] Follows typography and spacing standards
- [ ] Implements proper loading states
- [ ] Includes error handling

## Architecture Compliance
- [ ] Follows Clean Architecture pattern
- [ ] Uses Riverpod for state management
- [ ] Implements Result pattern for error handling
- [ ] Proper separation of data/domain/presentation layers

## Impact
What features/components does this change affect?

## Additional Notes
Any specific implementation details or concerns for reviewers.
